screen.equipmentquality.details.empty: This item does not have detailed affix data yet
screen.equipmentquality.details.no_attri: This item has no visible attribute modifiers
screen.equipmentquality.details.no_activ: This quality has not unlocked an active skill yet
screen.equipmentquality.details.no_passi: This quality has not generated a passive effect yet
screen.equipmentquality.details.skill_hi: Skill descriptions, cooldowns, and particle presentation will appear here
screen.equipmentquality.details.passive_: Passive affixes, triggers, and exact values will appear here
screen.equipmentquality.details.hint: Press I to open this panel. Right click will be used for active equipment skills
skill_desc.equipmentquality.arc_slash: Unleash a forward arc strike that deals area damage equal to %s of attack damage
skill_desc.equipmentquality.guard_pulse: Emit a defensive pulse that grants %s points of temporary shielding and knocks back nearby targets
skill_desc.equipmentquality.shock_burst: Release a close-range shockwave that deals burst damage equal to %s of attack damage
passive_desc.equipmentquality.steady_edg: Provides a stable boost to baseline attack performance. Current bonus: %s
passive_desc.equipmentquality.swift_stri: Improves attack rhythm and chaining feel. Current bonus: %s
passive_desc.equipmentquality.titan_grip: Enhances heavy-hit pressure and impact. Current bonus: %s
passive_desc.equipmentquality.guard_brea: Increases pressure against resilient targets. Current bonus: %s
